markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content initiatives and upcoming team changes.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Link Swap Approved:** A link swap with Strapi is approved. Strapi will add a link to Webstacks' "headless CMS" article in exchange for a mention in Webstacks' "enterprise CMS platforms" post.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Blog Refresh Strategy:** The blog refresh strategy is approved. Major article refreshes will be submitted for Webstacks review in Airtable; minor tweaks will be published directly.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [**New Airtable Automation:** A weekly Friday Airtable notification will be created to summarize all published articles, enabling timely social media promotion.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team Restructure:** GrowthX is adding strategy roles in December. Directors (e.g., Jakub) will shift to behind-the-scenes strategy, with new account managers taking over weekly calls.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)

## Topics

### Link Swap with Strapi

  - [**Request:** Strapi (a GrowthX client) requested a link from Webstacks' high-ranking "best enterprise CMS platforms" article.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Agreement:** Webstacks approved the swap under two conditions:](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
    1.  [**Webstacks' Link:** Strapi must link to Webstacks' "headless CMS" article.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
    2.  [**Webstacks' Content:** Webstacks will add a Strapi mention to its "enterprise CMS platforms" article.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [**Status:** Strapi has already added the link to Webstacks' article.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Jakub will introduce Eric to Victor (VP of Marketing at Strapi) to explore a potential interview collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)

### Blog Refresh Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Test different refresh approaches to measure performance and refine the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
  - [**Approved Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
      - [**Major Refreshes:** Submitted for Webstacks review in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
      - [**Minor Refreshes:** Published directly to the CMS by GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
  - [**Status:** Rachel has completed the first two major refreshes, which are now in Airtable for review.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)

### Airtable Notification Automation

  - [**Problem:** Webstacks needs timely awareness of new content to plan social media promotion, but frequent, individual notifications are disruptive.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [**Solution:** Jessalynn will create an Airtable automation for a weekly "publishing roundup."](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [**Details:**](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [**Content:** A single notification summarizing all articles published that week.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1550.0)
      - [**Timing:** Sent every Friday.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Provides a consolidated list for weekend planning, enabling social media promotion to begin on Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1587.0)

### GrowthX Team Restructure

  - [**Timeline:** Early to mid-December.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Adding strategy and support roles to increase strategic depth and execution efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1306.0)
  - [**Impact on Webstacks:**](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
      - [**Call Attendance:** Directors (e.g., Jakub) will attend fewer weekly calls, shifting to behind-the-scenes strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
      - [**Project Work:** Directors will gain bandwidth for large projects (e.g., the blog audit), ensuring continuity.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1214.0)
      - [**Execution Team:** The core team working on Webstacks' content is expected to remain consistent.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [Introduce Eric to Victor at Strapi.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=942.0)
      - [Confirm Strapi's link to Webstacks is live and do-follow.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [**Jessalynn:**](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
      - [Set up the weekly Friday Airtable "publishing roundup" notification.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1490.0)
  - [**Eric:**](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1041.0)
      - [Review the two major article refreshes in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
      - [Queue two new content requests: one for Sanity and one for general CMS-related topics.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
  - [**Rachel:**](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
      - [Publish minor article refreshes directly to the CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/DBNz4dQhRSoFWqkgsRgnjCz2WkZZ7z8S?tab=summary&timestamp=1082.0)
